hero.bio: Over 14 years designing mission-critical systems, implementing cloud-native architectures, and leading teams toward technical excellence. Passionate about observability, efficiency, and clean code.
casestudy.title: Architecture in Production
casestudy.card.title: Distributed Observability & CI/CD
casestudy.card.desc: Designing mission-critical Python (FastAPI) backends integrating deep telemetry with OpenTelemetry. Zero-Downtime deployment strategy via GitLab CI to containerized environments monitored by Prometheus.
mentoring.title: Corporate Mentorship & Technical Instruction
mentoring.desc: As an official instructor, I raise companies' engineering bar by training their IT teams in Cloud-Native technologies, Security, and Software Architecture based on real-world production scenarios.
homelab.desc: Maintaining on-premise infrastructure for critical environments. VMs with GPU passthrough, a private Gitea server, and self-hosted runners for CI/CD pipelines.
obs.hero.desc: Implementing OpenTelemetry and Prometheus in FastAPI microservices.
obs.challenge.title: The Business Challenge
obs.challenge.body: In a microservices ecosystem, a single request can traverse multiple containers. The challenge was eliminating the operational "blind spot": reducing incident resolution time (MTTR) and guaranteeing safe deployments without affecting service availability.
obs.fig1.caption: Fig 1. Network Topology & Orchestration: Distributed Kubernetes cluster managed via Portainer. Physical traffic separation using Apache APISIX (API Gateway) and environment segmentation (Pre/Prod) with isolated database access.
obs.solution.title: Solution Design & Traceability
obs.solution.body: We adopted the OpenTelemetry (OTel) standard for trace collection and Prometheus for metrics. The backend was designed in Python using FastAPI, leveraging its asynchronous nature (ASGI) to avoid penalizing business performance during telemetry generation.
obs.solution.callout: Deep Observability: This implementation automatically instruments database connections, allowing the detection of Slow Queries at the ORM level. Furthermore, all outbound requests to third-party systems (External APIs) are recorded with dedicated Spans, providing a clear dependency map that exposes latency times and error rates in real-time.
obs.cicd.title: CI/CD Implementation (GitLab)
obs.cicd.body: Continuous delivery was orchestrated via GitLab CI. The pipeline includes code validation (SAST), multi-stage Docker image builds, and a Rolling Update deployment strategy to ensure Zero-Downtime.
obs.impact.title: Impact & Metrics
obs.impact.mttr.title: MTTR Reduction
obs.impact.mttr.body: The team traces the exact origin of an error in under 2 minutes thanks to the propagated traceId.
obs.impact.speed.title: Speed
obs.impact.speed.body: The automated pipeline cut production release time from hours to minutes.
